# CalTrack
Calorie tracking API with AI Vision support.
Register meals by photo, query history and get personalized nutrition context.

OpenAPI schema: https://caltrack.xplaya.com/docs/json
MCP server: https://caltrack.xplaya.com/mcp

Authentication:
- Bearer token header: Authorization: Bearer cal_xxx  (Claude Desktop, direct API)
- Query parameter: https://caltrack.xplaya.com/mcp?key=cal_xxx  (Claude.ai web, other clients)
The "register" tool is public. All other tools require authentication.
